candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Reference earlier-control package: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the live on-policy successor value.
Penultimate successor value blended 25% live / 75% cached, with all terminal angle-clip semantics unchanged.
Penultimate successor value blended 50% live / 50% cached, with all terminal angle-clip semantics unchanged.

successor_value_audit_table.used_for: precursor of the preterminal learned successor value

successor_value_audit_table.source_type: live_on_policy_by_default; cached batch-start reference available from _build_cached_plan

successor_value_audit_table.where_produced: batch rollout loop: z_on = z_on_next after each micro-step
successor_value_audit_table.source_type: inherits whichever z_on_next variant the step emits
